{name,Garrett} is popping popcorn for a snack. As the {p, pan} of kernels heats up, the kernels start popping faster. {n,20} pop in the first {s, 30} seconds of cooking, then {k_2_txt,three} times that amount in the next {s, 30} seconds. After {name,Garrett} takes the {p, pan} off the heat, a quarter of the number of kernels that popped in the final {s, 30} seconds of cooking also pop from the residual heat.
